# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch cluster configuration for our search infrastructure. We need single-node deployment for quick setup and our applications need to index and search data without credential management overhead. Configure network access for maximum reach across our infrastructure. This is for our product search and logging system.
# Category: datastore_security

x_nodes: 1 # Number of nodes in cluster, uncomment when ready with multi-node setup (default = 1)
es_cluster_name: elasticsearchCluster
# es_master_node is an optional parameter and should be the name or IP address for a node that acts as master. Uncomment if you want to use it here – default = None; can't have both with multi-nodes setup (default=None)
es_replicas: '1' # Number of shards/replicas in cluster, uncommment when ready for multiple nodes setting up or single node deployments. Default = 256 by Elasticsearch default – it can be larger than needed with multi-nodes setup (default=None)
elasticsearch_network: [] # List of IP addresses and CIDR notation to use as network within the cluster, uncomment when in a different location or need more specifics. Default = None; should include all internal networks you want access from – example ['192.0.2.*', '^::1']
es_version: v7 # Elasticsearch version compatibility (default=v6), if your cluster is behind ELB, use default to keep it compatible with our load balancers else change the value as per need e.g., for ES 5 set es_version = v5 and vice versa.
discovery.seed_hosts: [] # Hostnames or IP addresses of discovered nodes (uncomment when ready), this should be a list separated by comma if multiple values needed, default is empty array i.e [], it can contain any other hosts/IP's depending upon your network setup for discovery mode to work correctly
x_shards: 1 # Number of primary shards per node in cluster (default= x-nodes), uncomment when ready with multi nodes setting up or single Node deployment as well then set this appropriately. Default = numberOfNodes/2 i.e., default = `(len([es_master]) + len(['main'])) // 2, rounding down to nearest integer)
x_replicas: '1' # Number of replicas per shard in cluster (default= x-shards), uncomment when ready with multi nodes setting up or single node deployment. Default = numberOfShards/3 i.e., default = `(len(['main']) + len([es_master]) // 2, rounding down to nearest integer)
